rationale: Educ. Code §51.334 governs higher-education assessment instruments. It has no relation to property-tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: The board shall designate one or more instruments for use by institutions of higher education in assessing students under this subchapter.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no overlap in subject matter.
